tool_args.label: Marcy Av, Borinquen Pl to Broadway, Brooklyn

payload.corridor_name: Marcy Av, Borinquen Pl to Broadway
payload.description: Confluence of three Williamsburg Bridge Plaza-bound bus routes (B24, B60, Q54). Experiences delays and slower speeds along this tail end stretch. BQE North and South (2024) study recommended providing a bus priority lane to alleviate these delays.

tool_args.label: Marcy Av, Borinquen Pl to Broadway - Bus Priority Street Improvement Project (SIP ID: 12263)

payload.project_name: Marcy Av, Borinquen Pl to Broadway - Bus Priority Street Improvement Project
payload.description: Bus Priority Street Improvement Project (SIP ID: 12263) along Marcy Avenue from Borinquen Place to Broadway, Brooklyn. Presented as a CB1 Transportation Committee Project Proposal in June 2025. Includes travel lane widened for safer truck/bus turns, bus lane merges into general travel lane, new Neighborhood Loading Zone, part-time parking lane replaced with full-time general travel lane, general travel lane converted to Bus Priority Lane.

warnings: project.program is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Program names caused identity overmerge; they are relation context, not strong project identity. Suggested relation: part_of_program.

payload.description: Williamsburg Bridge Plaza-bound bus route with Avg. Daily Ridership of 2,359 (2024). Uses Marcy Av corridor between Borinquen Pl and Broadway.
Williamsburg Bridge Plaza-bound bus route with Avg. Daily Ridership of 12,226 (2024). Uses Marcy Av corridor between Borinquen Pl and Broadway.

Williamsburg Bridge Plaza-bound bus route with Avg. Daily Ridership of 13,411 (2024). Uses Marcy Av corridor between Borinquen Pl and Broadway. Experiencing consistently slower speeds between 52nd St and 54th St (westbound).

tool_args.label: CB1 Transportation Committee Project Proposal - June 2025

payload.description: Presentation of the Marcy Av, Borinquen Pl to Broadway Bus Priority Street Improvement Project (SIP ID: 12263) to Brooklyn Community Board 1 Transportation Committee

tool_args.label: Bus delays compound on tail end stretch

payload.claim_text: Each bus route experiences delays and slower speeds along this tail end stretch. These delays compound on top of delays earlier in the routes' journeys and result in buses arriving late to their terminal, delaying the next scheduled run.
payload.subject: B24, B60, Q54 bus routes
payload.location: Marcy Av between Borinquen Pl and Broadway

location_normalized.raw_text: Marcy Av between Borinquen Pl and Broadway

tool_args.label: BQE North and South study recommendation

payload.claim_text: The BQE North and South (2024) study recommended providing a bus priority lane to alleviate these delays.
payload.subject: BQE North and South (2024) study
payload.location: Marcy Av, Borinquen Pl to Broadway

location_normalized.raw_text: Marcy Av, Borinquen Pl to Broadway

tool_args.label: Traffic congestion common on Marcy Av between Borinquen Pl and Broadway

payload.claim_text: Traffic congestion is common along Marcy Av between Borinquen Pl and Broadway, especially on weekdays in the late afternoon, before the PM rush hour lane along the east curb goes into effect.
payload.location: Marcy Av between Borinquen Pl and Broadway

location_normalized.raw_text: Marcy Av between Borinquen Pl and Broadway

tool_args.label: Loading zone demand at Marcy Av & S 4th St

payload.claim_text: The west side of Marcy Av between S 4 St and S 5 St experiences many daily instances of multiple vehicles loading and performing deliveries while occupying the bus stop for extended amounts of time.
payload.location: West side of Marcy Av between S 4 St and S 5 St

location_normalized.raw_text: West side of Marcy Av between S 4 St and S 5 St

tool_args.label: Difficult right turn from Marcy Av onto westbound Broadway

payload.claim_text: Buses must navigate a very tight right turn when continuing onto westbound Broadway from southbound Marcy Av; usually competing for space with other turning vehicles as well as improperly stopped traffic on the eastbound side of Broadway.

tool_args.label: Q54 consistently slower speeds between 52nd St and 54th St

payload.claim_text: Consistently slower speeds than elsewhere along the route
payload.subject: Q54 bus route

warnings: claim.route is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route ids should link to route records when supported. Suggested relation: route has_claim claim when the route endpoint resolves exactly.
